text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come across Silence Suzuka talking to Air
Groove and what appears to be a younger
student.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What happened? Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You could say that. I promised this student here
that I'd supervise her practice session, but
student council matters have suddenly come up.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, d-don't worry! I'll just go through my usual
routine, so I'll be okay training on my own!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...How do you normally practice?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm currently working towards my goal race, so
I'm trying to improve my running form and
stamina while also reading up on training theory!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
If I want to dominate the races, I have to make
sure to completely fix my weak spots! So...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um... Can I ask you something? Is winning the
whole reason you run?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... I'm sorry. I was just wondering.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Well, I mean... yes, o-of course it is! As a student
of Tracen Academy, it's imperative that I show
results!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: My times have gotten better already... and, uh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...Um, if it's okay with you, Air Groove...
Maybe I could oversee her training in your place?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What? Suzuka, you're offering to help?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't get me wrong. It's just... interesting. Haha...
I'll take you up on that offer.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Okay then, shall we get started? For today's
training...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You'll need to catch me.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Understood! ... ...Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Sh-she's way too fast! N-no amount of training theory or pacing are gonna close this gap!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I-I'm spent!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: H-how does she look so relaxed?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...Argh! I'm not done yet! I can keep on going!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huh?! Where are you going?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Ngh, what does it matter?! I just have to run! Run
run run RUN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The younger Umamusume bolts out of the
academy grounds chasing after Silence Suzuka.
Hardly a shred of theory can be observed in her
running form.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And yet strangely enough, she seems to be
enjoying herself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you've finally returned. I was wondering
where you'd gone.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...In any case, what happened? The both of you
look startlingly satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So? What did you think of the scenery during the
run?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Th-the scenery? Um... Well, after a certain point,
I stopped having stray thoughts, and...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...It felt great. It was so fun to just be running.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...I see. That's great. It looks like what I wanted to
teach you got across.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
In all the races I've run... that's the only thing I've
ever wanted to convey.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Kind of a labored way to get your point
across, but I guess that's Suzuka for you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Didn't expect you'd volunteer to lead the next
generation, though... Heh-heh. How you've
changed...
